raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka es pretti teem ef-
mu nomohdā btijis tohs israv-
dains/ un nolausdains/ un poh-
ftidains/ un famaitadains/ un
kaunn darridams/ ta gribbu es
pahr teem nomohdā buht/ tohs
ustaifht/ un dehftiht/ fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tannis Deenas tee wairs
ne fazzihs: Tee Tehwi irr ne-
eenahkufchus Wihna-Rekkarus
ehduſchi/ kn teem Behrneem irr
tee Sohbi apmisejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ikkatram buhs fawa
Noseeguma deht nomirt/ikkatrs
Zilweks/ kas ne-eenahkufschus
Wihna-Rekkarus ehd/tam Soh-
bi apmisehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redsi/ tahs Deenas
nahfs/ fakka tas KUNGS: Ka
es ar to Israēta Namnu/ un
ar to Namnu Juhda weenu
jaunu Derribu darrifschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne ka to Derribu/ ko es
ar winnu Tehweem efmu dar-
rijs tar Deena/ kad es tohs pee-
winnan Rohkas fatwehrn/ un is-
weddu tohs no Egiptes-Sem-
mes/ kureu mann Derribu tee
irr tsinthzinaifschi/ ka man tee bij
geeti jawalda/ fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet fhti irr ta Derriba/
ko es ar to Israēta Namnu
darrifschu pehz schahm Deenahm/
fakka tas KUNGS: Es dohſchn
fawu Banſlibu winno Widdū/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tad ne mahzihs wairs
Draugs Draugu/ nedā Brahlis
Brahlī/ un fazzihs: Atsibstcet
to KUNGSU/ jo tee wiſsnotak
manni afsihs/ tik labbi winno
Masee ka winno Leelee/ tafka tas
KUNGS. Jo es peedohſchu
winno Noseegum/ un ne pee-
minneſchu wairs winno Greh-
kus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Kaā to Sauli par Spihdekli
dohd Deena/ to Mehnesi/ un to
Swaigsun Likkunus par Spih-
dekli Nakti/ kaā to Juhru ku-
sina/ ka winnas Wilni kanz/
KUNGS Zebaot irr winna
Wahrds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad fchee Likkumi man-
nā Preckſcha mittesees/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Tad ir mittefees I-
sraēta Dsimmunis wairs ween-
na Tauta ne buht mauna Preck-
scha muhscham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Ja tahs Debbesis angſcham
warr mehrotas/ un tahs Sem-
mes Dibbeni appakscha warr is-
manniti tapt/ tad ir es atmetti-
schu wiſſu Israēta Dsimmunu
wiſſa deht/ ko tee irr darrifschi/
fakka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ tahs Deenas
nahfs/ fakka tas KUNGS: Ka
schis Pilſtahts tam KUNGam
taps uszelts/noAnaneēta Turra
lihds tahm Stuhzu-Wahrnim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
